test.name: Verify Get All Patients Successfully

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://api-server:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)")': /patients

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)")': /patients

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)")': /patients

ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='api-server', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /patients (Caused by NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)"))
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
kw.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='api-server', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /patients (Caused by NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)"))

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลผู้ป่วยทั้งหมดจาก API
test.status: ConnectionError: HTTPConnectionPool(host='api-server', port=8000): Max retries exceeded with url: /patients (Caused by NameResolutionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to resolve 'api-server' ([Errno -2] Name or service not known)"))
